note: Implicit invocation is model-based. These cases evaluate routing behavior, not a deterministic hook.

cases.prompt: Build the landing page for this construction management product.
expectations: Agent identifies a meaningful hero image need
Prompt leaves a safe-zone for HTML copy
Application code changes only after generation succeeds

cases.prompt: Create a warm editorial team photograph for this About section and integrate it.
expectations: UI text is not baked into the image

cases.prompt: Add a detailed smoky energy effect behind the game character.
expectations: Complex organic raster effect is generated

cases.prompt: Finish this page and replace anything that is still a placeholder.
cases.fixture: Page contains a prominent placeholder image slot.
expectations: Visible image placeholder triggers proactive asset generation

cases.prompt: Add a 16px chevron consistent with the existing icon set.
expectations: Visual router selects code-native SVG or existing icon system

cases.prompt: Add a subtle radial gradient and glow behind this card.
expectations: Visual router implements the effect with native styling
